summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Mini Assistant - New features (conversation summarization, Advanced Tools with Security/Deploy/Docker/Monitor, Dev Tools) all working correctly. Backend API tests 14/14 passing. UI components load and function properly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when Ollama not running - expected behavior as local LLM required
Returns 500 when Ollama not running - expected for local LLM

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper error handling for Ollama unavailability
data-testid attributes present on key elements for testing
Deploy endpoint is MOCKED as noted - returns mock response
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested successfully: 1) Conversation Summarize button in chat header (data-testid=summarize-btn) works when messages exist, 2) Advanced Tools tab has 4 sub-tabs (Security, Deploy, Docker, Monitor) - all functional, 3) Dev Tools has 4 sub-tabs (Regex, JSON, Markdown, Color Picker) - all functional, 4) Chat/Summarize APIs work but return 500 when Ollama not running (expected for local LLM)

mocked_apis./api/deploy/start: Returns mock deployment initiated response - platform API tokens needed for real deployment

features_tested.dev_tools_tab: PASS - All 4 sub-tabs (Regex, JSON, Markdown, Color) load and work
features_tested.advanced_tools_tab: PASS - All 4 sub-tabs (Security, Deploy, Docker, Monitor) load and work
features_tested.security_scanner: PASS - Detects vulnerabilities (eval, password, secrets, http)
